summary: Makes failed application-image updates recover cleanly while preserving Switch POS Caddy TLS routing and publishing project release metadata to DjangoLux.
highlights: Adds token-matched terminal image-update recovery and returns operators from maintenance after the application is healthy.
Pins the baked DjangoLux version and hardens the resident Composer update path without changing Caddy TLS routing.
Publishes project version, summary, highlights, and release URL in the DjangoLux application-image update review.
